name: Multi-Helix Architecture
description: Cognition model with simultaneous processing strands — mental, emotional, physical, spiritual — producing emergent intelligence through cross-strand coupling. Each helix carries its own frequency while resonating with adjacent strands at φ-ratios. Swarm extension enables distributed multi-helix networks across parallel agents.

core_attributes.pattern: multi-strand parallel processing, cross-helix coupling, emergent cognition
